app.title: Turning a pile of documents into a searchable useable knowledge base
app.author: linuxrebe1
proposed_tests: Run DocuBrowser locally with sample docs, check indexing time
Add a custom data source and query DocuBrowser for specific terms
Visualize DocuBrowser's knowledge graph for an ontology test
